004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *

010 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall;
018
019import static java.util.Collections.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.function.Suppliers.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
024import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
025
026import java.text.*;
027import java.util.*;
028import java.util.function.*;
029
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.commons.conversion.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.commons.function.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
034
035/**
036 * A one-time-use non-thread-safe object that's meant to be used once and then thrown away.
037 *
038 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
039 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not typically thread safe.
040 * </ul>
041 *
042 */
043@SuppressWarnings({
044   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
045})
046public abstract class ContextSession {
047
048   // Property name constants
049   private static final String PROP_debug = "debug";
050   private static final String PROP_ContextSession_debug = "ContextSession.debug";
051
052   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
053   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
054   private static final String ARG_value = "value";
055   private static final String ARG_msg = "msg";
056   private static final String ARG_args = "args";
057   private static final String ARG_type = "type";
058   private static final String ARG_apply = "apply";
059   private static final String ARG_key = "key";
060   private static final String ARG_builder = "builder";
061
062   /**
063    * Builder class.
064    */
065   @SuppressWarnings({
066      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
067   })
068   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> {
069
070      /**
071       * Returns this object cast to the self (CRTP) type.
072       *
073       * @return This object.
074       */
075      @SuppressWarnings({
076         "unchecked" // CRTP self-type cast is safe by construction.
077      })
078      protected final SELF self() {
079         return (SELF)this;
080      }
081
082      private Boolean debug;
083      private boolean unmodifiable;
084      private Context ctx;
085      private Memoizer<LinkedHashMap<String,Object>> properties;
086
087      /**
088       * Convenience method for converting values using {@link BasicConverter}.
089       *
090       * @param <T> The target type.
091       * @param value The value to convert.
092       * @param type The target class.
093       * @return The converted value.
094       */
095      protected static <T> T cvt(Object value, Class<T> type) {
096         return BasicConverter.INSTANCE.to(value, null, null, type);
097      }
098
099      /**
100       * Constructor.
101       *
102       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
103       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
104       */
105      protected Builder(Context ctx) {
106         this.ctx = assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx);
107         this.properties = memoizer(LinkedHashMap::new);
108      }
109
110      /**
111       * Applies a consumer to this builder if it's the specified type.
112       *
113       * @param <T> The expected type.
114       * @param type The expected type.
115       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
116       * @param apply   The consumer to apply.
117       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
118       * @return This object.
119       */
120      public <T> SELF apply(Class<T> type, Consumer<T> apply) {
121         if (assertArgNotNull(ARG_type, type).isInstance(this))
122            assertArgNotNull(ARG_apply, apply).accept(type.cast(this));
123         return self();
124      }
125
126      /**
127       * Build the object.
128       *
129       * @return The built object.
130       */
131      public abstract ContextSession build();
132
133      /**
134       * Debug mode.
135       *
136       * <p>
137       * Enables the following additional information during parsing:
138       * <ul>
139       *    <li> When bean setters throws exceptions, the exception includes the object stack information in order to determine how that method was invoked.
140       * </ul>
141       *
142       * <p>
143       * If not specified, defaults to {@link Context.Builder#debug()}.
144       *
145       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
146       *    <li class='ja'>{@link MarshalledConfig#debug()}
147       *    <li class='jm'>{@link Context.Builder#debug()}
148       *
149       * @param value
150       *    The new value for this property.
151       *    <br>If <jk>null</jk>, defaults to {@link Context#isDebug()}.
152       * @return This object.
153       */
154      public SELF debug(Boolean value) {
155         debug = value;
156         return self();
157      }
158
159      /**
160       * Session properties.
161       *
162       * <p>
163       * Session properties are generic key-value pairs that can be passed through the session and made
164       * available to any customized serializers/parsers or swaps.
165       *
166       * @param value
167       *    The new value for this property.
168       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
169       * @return This object.
170       */
171      public SELF properties(Map<String,Object> value) {
172         assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
173         properties.reset();
174         value.forEach(this::property);
175         return self();
176      }
177
178      /**
179       * Adds a property to this session.
180       *
181       * <p>
182       * If the key matches a known session property (e.g. <js>"debug"</js> or <js>"ContextSession.debug"</js>),
183       * the value is converted via {@link BasicConverter} and routed to the corresponding typed setter.
184       * Unknown keys are stored in the raw session properties map.
185       *
186       * @param key The property key.
187       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
188       * @param value The property value.
189       *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> (resets typed properties to their default; removes raw properties).
190       * @return This object.
191       */
192      public SELF property(String key, Object value) {
193         assertArgNotNull(ARG_key, key);
194         switch (key) {
195            case PROP_debug, PROP_ContextSession_debug:
196               return debug(cvt(value, Boolean.class));
197            default:
198               var map = properties.get();
199               if (value == null) {
200                  map.remove(key);
201               } else {
202                  map.put(key, value);
203               }
204               return self();
205         }
206      }
207
208      /**
209       * Create an unmodifiable session.
210       *
211       * <p>
212       * The created ContextSession object will be unmodifiable which makes it suitable for caching and reuse.
213       *
214       * @return This object.
215       */
216      public SELF unmodifiable() {
217         unmodifiable = true;
218         return self();
219      }
220   }
221
222   private final boolean debug;
223   private final boolean unmodifiable;
224   private final Context ctx;
225   private final Map<String,Object> properties;
226   private List<String> warnings;   // Any warnings encountered.
227
228   /**
229    * Default constructor.
230    *
231    * @param builder The builder for this object.
232    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
233    */
234   protected ContextSession(Builder<?> builder) {
235      assertArgNotNull(ARG_builder, builder);
236      ctx = builder.ctx;
237      debug = o(builder.debug).orElse(ctx.isDebug());
238      unmodifiable = builder.unmodifiable;
239      var sp = builder.properties.get();
240      if (unmodifiable) {
241         properties = sp.isEmpty() ? Collections.emptyMap() : u(sp);
242      } else {
243         properties = sp;
244      }
245   }
246
247   /**
248    * Logs a warning message.
249    *
250    * @param msg The warning message.
251    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
252    * @param args Optional {@link MessageFormat}-style arguments.
253    *    <br>Cannot contain <jk>null</jk> values.
254    */
255   public void addWarning(String msg, Object...args) {
256      assertArgsNotNull(ARG_msg, msg, ARG_args, args);
257      if (unmodifiable)
258         return;
259      if (warnings == null)
260         warnings = new LinkedList<>();
261      warnings.add((warnings.size() + 1) + ": " + f(msg, args));
262   }
263
264   /**
265    * Throws a {@link BeanRuntimeException} if any warnings occurred in this session and debug is enabled.
266    */
267   public void checkForWarnings() {
268      if (debug && ! getWarnings().isEmpty())
269         throw brex("Warnings occurred in session: \n" + join(getWarnings(), "\n"));
270   }
271
272   /**
273    * Returns the context that created this session.
274    *
275    * @return The context that created this session.
276    */
277   public Context getContext() { return ctx; }
278
279   /**
280    * Returns the session properties on this session.
281    *
282    * @return The session properties on this session.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
283    */
284   public final Map<String,Object> getSessionProperties() { return properties; }
285
286   /**
287    * Returns the warnings that occurred in this session.
288    *
289    * @return The warnings that occurred in this session, or <jk>null</jk> if no warnings occurred.
290    */
291   public final List<String> getWarnings() { return warnings == null ? emptyList() : warnings; }
292
293   /**
294    * Debug mode enabled.
295    *
296    * @see Context.Builder#debug()
297    * @return
298    *    <jk>true</jk> if debug mode is enabled.
299    */
300   public boolean isDebug() { return debug; }
301
302   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
303   public String toString() {
304      return r(properties());
305   }
306
307   /**
308    * Returns the properties on this bean as a map for debugging.
309    *
310    * @return The properties on this bean as a map for debugging.
311    */
312   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
313      return filteredBeanPropertyMap()
314         .a(PROP_debug, debug);
315   }
316}
